ast.name: title
ast.source: Discord RPC is paused — click to resume
ast.target: Discord RPC已暂停——点击以恢复

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your Discord application client ID. Leave empty to use the default. Create your own app at discord.com/developers/applications for custom images and branding.
ast.target: 您的 Discord 应用客户端 ID。留空则使用默认值。您可以在 discord.com/developers/applications 创建自己的应用，以自定义图片和品牌。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display your vault name in Discord status.
ast.target: 在 Discord 状态中显示您的保险库名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Override the vault name shown in Discord. Leave empty to use the real vault name.
ast.target: 覆盖 Discord 中显示的保险库名称。留空则使用真实保险库名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display the current file name in Discord status.
ast.target: 在 Discord 状态中显示当前文件名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include the file extension (e.g. .md) in the file name.
ast.target: 在文件名中包含文件扩展名（例如 .md）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When on: timer resets each time you open a new file. When off: timer shows total time since the plugin was loaded.
ast.target: 开启时：每次打开新文件时计时器重置。关闭时：计时器显示自插件加载以来的总时间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a notice when the plugin connects to Discord.
ast.target: 当插件连接到 Discord 时显示通知。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When on: editing/reading icon is the large image and the Obsidian logo is the small image. When off (default): Obsidian logo is large, editing/reading icon is small.
ast.target: 开启时：编辑/阅读图标是大图，Obsidian 标志是小图。关闭时（默认）：Obsidian 标志是大图，编辑/阅读图标是小图。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Override the text shown in Discord. Leave empty to use the default. Available placeholders: {file}, {fileNoExt}, {folder}, {vault}, {mode}, {wordCount}
ast.target: 覆盖 Discord 中显示的文本。留空则使用默认值。可用占位符：{file}、{fileNoExt}、{folder}、{vault}、{mode}、{wordCount}

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Top line on the Discord status (e.g. "Editing {fileNoExt}").
ast.target: Discord 状态的第一行（例如“正在编辑 {fileNoExt}”）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Bottom line on the Discord status (e.g. "{mode} in {vault}").
ast.target: Discord 状态的第二行（例如“在 {vault} 中 {mode}”）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Files or folders matching any of these patterns will be hidden from Discord (one pattern per line). Supports plain text (Privat/) and glob patterns (Journal/**, *.canvas).
ast.target: 匹配这些模式的文件或文件夹将不会在 Discord 中显示（每行一个模式）。支持纯文本（Privat/）和 glob 模式（Journal/**、*.canvas）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically change or clear your presence after a period of inactivity.
ast.target: 在一段时间不活动后自动更改或清除您的在线状态。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How long to wait before marking you as idle.
ast.target: 将您标记为空闲前需要等待多长时间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: What to show on Discord when you are idle.
ast.target: 当您空闲时，在 Discord 上显示什么。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Up to 2 buttons shown on your Discord profile. Leave label or URL empty to disable a button.
ast.target: 您的 Discord 个人资料上最多显示 2 个按钮。将标签或 URL 留空可禁用按钮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Text shown on the button (max 32 characters).
ast.target: 按钮上显示的文本（最多 32 个字符）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Must start with https://; leave empty to disable.
ast.target: 必须以 https:// 开头；留空则禁用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: URL 必须以 https:// 开头
